summary: Feather (soften) a mask edge by a physical pixel half-width. Compatibility macro: normalizes to mask.to_sdf -> sdf.offset(0) -> sdf.to_mask(smoothstep, half_width_px).

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: The coverage or selection mask to transform.

params.name: half_width_px
params.doc: Half the physical feather width in pixels; the soft edge spans 2*half_width_px centered on the contour. >= 0.

params.name: threshold
params.doc: The contour threshold forwarded to mask.to_sdf (coverage >= threshold is inside); default 0.5.

perceptual.reason: mask.feather is an exact macro over the EDT/SDF path verified by hash-identity with the hand-written expansion and a measured feather width; there is no perceptual metric
